title: The Indexed Echo
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the B aspect has three known entries: ingredients [2, 5, 8] all have B+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with B+. The fourth must be one of: [1, 3, 4, 6, 7]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 1: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 3: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 4: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 6: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 7: survives
Only ingredient 7 remains. It is alchemical Nnp, which has B+. It is the missing fourth entry.
